action_text: Type "agent" into the reports list Search field
rationale: We need to locate the report that shows incidents by agent; filtering the list with a broad keyword will surface it quickly.

action_text: Type "Incidents by agent" into the reports list Search field
rationale: If the report title includes "Incidents by agent", searching this exact phrase should narrow directly to the needed report.

action_text: Type "assigned to" into the reports list Search field
rationale: The metric is incidents assigned to an agent; using "assigned to" is another effective keyword to find the report.

action_text: Click the reports list Search input to focus it
rationale: First focusing the in-page search box ensures the following text entry goes to the correct field.

action_text: Press Enter in the reports list Search field to apply the search
rationale: Submitting the search may be required by the page to apply the filter after typing.
